project_type: AWS CDK infrastructure-as-code in Go (serverless audio processing pipeline)
build_system: Go modules + npm (for CDK CLI). Go CDK constructs use jsii runtime requiring Node.js.
test_framework: Go testing with CDK assertions (github.com/aws/aws-cdk-go/awscdk/v2/assertions). Lambda tests in lambda/processor/main_test.go. Snapshot test in cdk-base_test.go using testdata/snapshot.json.
build_command: NODE_OPTIONS="" GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org,direct GONOSUMCHECK=* GONOSUMDB=* GOSUMDB=off go build ./...
test_command: NODE_OPTIONS="" GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org,direct GONOSUMCHECK=* GONOSUMDB=* GOSUMDB=off go test -count=1 ./...
verification_instructions: 1. Run go test -count=1 ./... (with env vars) for CDK tests. 2. Run go test in lambda/processor/ for Lambda tests. 3. Delete testdata/snapshot.json and re-run tests to regenerate after template changes.
snapshot_or_generated_files: testdata/snapshot.json - auto-generated by TestStackSnapshotStability. Delete the file and re-run tests to regenerate after CDK template changes.
setup_instructions: 1. Set NODE_OPTIONS="" to avoid preload module error. 2. Set GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org,direct GONOSUMCHECK=* GONOSUMDB=* GOSUMDB=off for module downloads. 3. Go modules are in go.mod, Lambda has its own go.mod in lambda/processor/.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network - package registries accessible. Node.js preload proxy issue: must set NODE_OPTIONS="" for any jsii/CDK operations. Go 1.25.1, Node.js v22 available.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests first, then minimal code. Conventional commits. ARCHITECTURE.md must be updated with Mermaid diagram. Run go test ./... and cdk synth before pushing.
key_patterns: CDK assertions use Template_FromStack + HasResourceProperties/ResourceCountIs. State machine definition verified via regex matching on DefinitionString Fn::Join arrays. Retry/Catch tested via StringLikeRegexp. Snapshot test does structural JSON comparison. Lambda code uses simple handler function pattern with Event/Response structs.
directory_structure: Root: CDK stack (cdk-base.go, pipeline.go) + tests. lambda/processor/: Go Lambda handler with its own module. testdata/: snapshot golden file. .github/workflows/ci.yml: CI config.
